response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's agentic workflow focus. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and major cloud platforms (AWS mentioned only briefly; no GCP/Azure). The 8+ years of AI-specific experience required is not clearly evidenced — AI work appears to be recent (under 1 year).
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and polyglot background spanning 13+ years
Current role involves MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks, directly relevant to the JD
Strong track record of customer-facing technical leadership, workshops, and mentoring
concerns: Insufficient demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, and LLM optimization
Limited cloud-platform breadth — only AWS CDK mentioned, no GCP/Azure or large-scale AI infra
AI/GenAI experience appears recent (~1 year), well short of the 8+ years of production AI solutions required
